package rulefixtures

// scenario for sync_mutex_for_readonly_config: `mu.RLock(); v := config.X; mu.RUnlock()` for read-mostly config that changes rarely
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule676PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario676Positive(records []Rule676PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
